mapper.select: SELECT note_date AS noteDate, content, updated_by AS updatedBy FROM sf_daily_note WHERE note_date >= CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND note_date <= CONCAT(#{year}, '-12-31') ORDER BY note_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sf_daily_note (note_date, content, updated_by, updated_at) VALUES (#{noteDate}, #{content}, #{updatedBy}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE content = VALUES(content), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_at = NOW()
